channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The skies for American Airlines are clearer than you think
item.description: Robert Isom is steering American Airlines through a very particular kind of turbulence.

item.title: Ed Crane Was Right About Free Speech And The Iraq War Years Before The Country Caught Up
item.description: Ed Crane had a gift for identifying moments when liberty required an unpopular defense — and history has a way of catching up to him.

item.title: Protectionism Serves K Street and Hurts Main Street
item.description: The lobbying industry has exploded under Trump’s tariff regime.

item.title: Navigating the GOP Divide over Artificial Intelligence
item.description: The key is to draw a line between AI architecture and AI applications.

item.title: Rubio seals civil nuclear cooperation agreement with Hungary
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio inked a nuclear cooperation agreement involving the U.S. and Hungary, hailing the countries' close relationship.

item.title: As baby boomers are forced to ‘unretire’ because they’ve not saved enough, 6-year-olds in Germany will soon have retirement accounts
item.description: Millions of baby boomers can’t afford to retire. It’s a fate that Gen Alpha in Germany may never have to face under new plans.

item.title: Trump unveils maritime action plan as China dominates global shipbuilding
item.description: Trump administration unveils plan to reclaim U.S. maritime dominance as China controls global ship production and 99% of trade moves on foreign ships.

item.title: DNC Chair Ken Martin boasts ‘win after win,’ shrugs off massive Trump, Republican money lead
item.description: Democrats tout "positive momentum" with recent victories as they eye midterm elections, hoping to replicate their 2018 success in winning back Congres...

item.title: Transit funding hits record highs as ridership languishes, new report questions return on billions
item.description: Federal transit spending hits record highs while bus and rail usage continues to lag behind pre-pandemic levels, sparking debate over policy effective...

item.title: Lowe’s CEO used to make $4.35 an hour working at Target. His secret to climbing the corporate ladder was volunteering for jobs ‘nobody else wanted’
item.description: “I had to find a way to differentiate myself,” Marvin Ellison said.

item.title: Andrew Sullivan Is A Trump Supporter, But As With Most Things Political He Just Doesn’t Know It
item.description: Someone please tell Sullivan that what he wants from the Democrat Party is precisely what's offered by Trump's presidency.

item.title: Victoria’s Secret CEO says new customers are embracing the escape provided by the glamorous brand: ‘We were living in a beige world for awhile’
item.description: Maximalism is back at Victoria's Secret.

item.title: Rooting Against Anti-American Olympians Is The Patriotic Thing To Do
item.description: U.S. athletes who use the Olympics as an avenue to thumb their noses at America deserve nothing but scorn and defeat.

item.title: There Is No Such National Holiday as Presidents Day
item.description: George Washington’s birthday should not be a celebration of presidents in general.

item.title: European Union to send observer to Trump's Board of Peace meeting
item.description: The European Union announced Monday that EU Commissioner for the Mediterranean Dubravka Suica will attend the first formal meeting of President Trump'...

item.title: AI is transforming science – more researchers need access to these powerful tools for discovery
item.description: Five years ago, our AlphaFold AI system solved the 50-year grand challenge of protein structure prediction. But that's not the whole story.

item.title: Nancy Mace proposes bill to make aliens deportable, inadmissible for animal cruelty
item.description: Republican Rep. Nancy Mace of South Carolina fields a measure to declare aliens who are convicted of animal abuse as deportable and inadmissible.

item.title: 5 Things To Know About The Secret Wisconsin School Trans Bathroom Policy
item.description: Across the country, reliably red communities like this one assume their schools reflect their values. One by one, they’re learning that assumption is ...

item.title: No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
item.description: Lawmakers and the White House offered no signs of compromise Sunday in their battle over oversight of federal immigration officers that has led to a p...

item.title: Cornyn opponent Paxton says Washington Republicans wasting time, money trying to rescue incumbent
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton says Washington Republicans are wasting their time and resources trying to throw Sen. John Cornyn a lifeline in the ...

item.title: Why Dale Earnhardt’s Legacy Still Matters
item.description: The life and death of the NASCAR champion show how legend can become as meaningful as accomplishment.

item.title: Teen daughter of a Chicago man detained in an immigration case dies from a rare cancer
item.description: A Chicago teen who spoke out for her father's release after he was detained last fall by immigration officials in a deportation case has died after ba...

item.title: Trump Throws In the Towel on Minneapolis Surge
item.description: Ultimately, the battle is about whether our immigration laws can be enforced.

item.title: Trump's border czar says 'small' security force will remain in Minnesota after enforcement drawdown
item.description: White House border czar Tom Homan said Sunday that more than 1,000 immigration agents have left Minnesota's Twin Cities area and hundreds more will de...

item.title: From Chuck To AOC, Here Are The Worst People Of The Week
item.description: From Chuck Schumer’s race-baiting false equivalencies to Lisa Murkowski being, well, Lisa Murkowski, it was a great week for bad people.

item.title: Evolving Your Wealth Management Practice for 2026 and Beyond
item.description: Wealth management’s 2026 outlook: growth will hinge on transparency, integration, and relevance to women and next-generation investors. The post Evolv...

item.title: AI Is Reshaping Bank Risk
item.description: AI is exposing the limits of legacy bank controls, making governance quality critical to resilience and investor confidence. The post AI Is Reshaping ...

item.title: What Makes an Ideal Leveraged Buyout Candidate?
item.description: In competitive PE markets, successful LBOs depend on durable business models, recurring cash flows, defensible market positions, and disciplined targe...

item.title: Rethinking Household Asset Allocation Under Capital Constraints
item.description: Leveraged ETFs aren’t about more risk, they’re about using less capital to achieve a desired risk profile in household portfolios. The post Rethinking...

item.title: Stockholm’s Capital Markets Success: More Than Meatballs
item.description: Stockholm’s capital-market success reflects more than IPOs and PE activity. It offers a case study in how culture, institutions, and incentives shape ...
